metadata.name: O365 Tenancy Compliance Control Mapping
metadata.description: Mapping of M365 controls to MCSB, ISO, GDPR, and insurance regulatory frameworks

MCSB_v2.name: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark v2
MCSB_v2.description: Current Microsoft security benchmark — identity and data protection domains most relevant for M365
MCSB_v2.m365Relevance: IM (Identity Management), DP (Data Protection), LT (Logging & Threat Detection), PA (Privileged Access)

ISO_27001_2022.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
ISO_27001_2022.m365Relevance: A.9 Access Control, A.10 Cryptography, A.12 Operations Security, A.13 Communications Security, A.18 Compliance

GDPR.name: General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR)
GDPR.description: Data protection regulation for personal data processing
GDPR.m365Relevance: Art.5 Principles, Art.25 Privacy by Design, Art.30 Records, Art.32 Security, Art.33 Breach Notification

NIST_800_53_Rev5.name: NIST SP 800-53 Revision 5
NIST_800_53_Rev5.description: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems
NIST_800_53_Rev5.m365Relevance: AC (Access Control), IA (Identification/Auth), SC (System/Comms Protection), AU (Audit), IR (Incident Response)

UK_NCSC_14.name: UK NCSC 14 Cloud Security Principles
UK_NCSC_14.description: National Cyber Security Centre guidance for secure cloud adoption

identityManagement.name: Identity Management
identityManagement.m365Implementation: Entra ID, MFA, Conditional Access, PIM, SSPR, Authentication Methods

privilegedAccess.name: Privileged Access
privilegedAccess.m365Implementation: PIM, Global Admin limits, Break-glass accounts, CA for admin roles

dataProtection.name: Data Protection
dataProtection.m365Implementation: Sensitivity labels, DLP, encryption in transit (TLS), Information Barriers, Rights Management

loggingThreatDetection.name: Logging and Threat Detection
loggingThreatDetection.m365Implementation: Unified Audit Log, Defender for O365, Secure Score, Alert Policies

incidentResponse.name: Incident Response
incidentResponse.m365Implementation: Alert policies, Automated Investigation, Incident queue, Threat Explorer

postureVulnerability.name: Posture and Vulnerability Management
postureVulnerability.m365Implementation: Secure Score, Secure Score recommendations, Configuration assessment

controlMappings.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controlMappings.description: Enforce MFA for all users via Conditional Access
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users

controlMappings.name: Conditional Access Policies
controlMappings.description: Risk-based access controls via Conditional Access
controlMappings.m365Implementation: CA policies for location, device, risk-level, application controls

controlMappings.name: Legacy Authentication Block
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Conditional Access policy blocking legacy auth clients

controlMappings.name: Privileged Access Management
controlMappings.description: Limit and manage Global Admin and privileged role access
controlMappings.m365Implementation: PIM for admin roles, Global Admin count ≤5, break-glass accounts

controlMappings.name: Guest Access Governance
controlMappings.description: Control and review external/guest user access
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Guest access policies, quarterly access reviews, guest expiry
controlMappings.benchmark: Quarterly guest review, ≤150 guests for 800-user tenant

controlMappings.name: Email Authentication (DKIM/DMARC/SPF)
controlMappings.description: Configure email authentication to prevent spoofing
controlMappings.m365Implementation: DKIM enabled, DMARC policy set (reject/quarantine), SPF configured for all verified domains
controlMappings.benchmark: DKIM enabled, DMARC = reject/quarantine on all domains

controlMappings.name: Mail Flow Forwarding Controls
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Block auto-forwarding to external domains, monitor transport rules

controlMappings.name: Anti-Phishing Protection
controlMappings.description: Configure anti-phishing policies with impersonation protection
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Anti-phishing policy with strict threshold, mailbox intelligence, domain/user impersonation protection
controlMappings.auditQuery: Get-AntiPhishPolicy | Select Name, Enabled, PhishThresholdLevel, EnableMailboxIntelligenceProtection

controlMappings.name: Defender for Office 365
controlMappings.description: Enable Defender for Office 365 Safe Attachments and Safe Links
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Defender for O365 P1/P2, Safe Attachments = Dynamic Delivery, Safe Links = On with tracking

controlMappings.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
controlMappings.description: DLP policies for sensitive data in Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams
controlMappings.m365Implementation: DLP policies for UK PII (NINO, passport), financial data, insurance claims data
controlMappings.auditQuery: Get-DlpCompliancePolicy | Select Name, Mode, Enabled, Workload
controlMappings.benchmark: ≥3 active DLP policies covering Exchange + SharePoint

controlMappings.name: Sensitivity Labels
controlMappings.description: Information protection labels for classification and encryption
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Sensitivity labels published and applied to Exchange, SharePoint, Teams

controlMappings.name: SharePoint External Sharing
controlMappings.description: Control external sharing from SharePoint and OneDrive
controlMappings.m365Implementation: SharePoint sharing restricted to authenticated guests, link expiry enforced

controlMappings.name: Unified Audit Logging
controlMappings.description: Enable and retain unified audit logs for security and compliance
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Unified audit log enabled, retention ≥1 year (regulatory: 7 years for insurance)

controlMappings.name: Retention Policies
controlMappings.description: Data retention policies for Exchange, SharePoint, Teams
controlMappings.m365Implementation: Retention policies for regulatory retention periods (FCA: 5-7 years)
controlMappings.auditQuery: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy | Select Name, Enabled, Workload, RetentionDuration
controlMappings.benchmark: Retention policies covering Exchange, SharePoint, Teams

controlMappings.name: Teams External & Guest Controls
controlMappings.description: Restrict Teams external access and guest capabilities
controlMappings.m365Implementation: External access restricted to specific domains, guest access reviewed, meeting policies controlled
controlMappings.benchmark: External access restricted, guest access governed

insuranceSectorAdditions.description: Additional controls specific to insurance/financial services M365 requirements

controls.name: Client Communication Segregation
controls.description: Ensure policyholder communications are appropriately handled and classified
controls.m365Implementation: Sensitivity labels on client emails, DLP for policyholder PII, information barriers if required

controls.name: Email Continuity (Operational Resilience)
controls.description: Ensure email service meets FCA operational resilience requirements
controls.m365Implementation: M365 SLA review, DR plan alignment, alternative communication channels

controls.name: Claims Document Protection
controls.description: Protect insurance claims documents containing special category data (health, injury)
controls.m365Implementation: Sensitivity labels on claims folders, DLP for health/injury data, restricted SharePoint sharing

controls.name: Cyber Security Controls (Lloyd's)
controls.description: Meet Lloyd's MS13 cyber security requirements for M365
controls.m365Implementation: MFA enforced, anti-phishing strict, Safe Attachments/Links, audit logging

controls.name: Immutable Audit Trail
controls.description: Maintain immutable M365 audit logs for regulatory retention
controls.m365Implementation: Unified audit log + export to immutable storage (Azure Blob immutability / Sentinel), 7-year retention

controls.name: DORA ICT Service Classification
controls.description: Classify M365 as critical ICT service under DORA (effective 2027)
controls.m365Implementation: M365 registered in ICT service register, Microsoft contractual review, exit strategy documented

statuses.definition: Control partially implemented or not fully verified
